title: I let Claude Code take my job (it did better than me)
summary: Alberta Tech conducted an experiment letting Claude Code handle coding work and found it performed better than manual work. The video explores whether AI coding assistants can fully replace human developers and covers the tool's capabilities and limitations across a workflow.
